Container.Name: discord_cleanup
Container.Overview: An automated Discord bot that cleans up old messages from configured channels on a schedule. Built for homelab setups running services like Plex, Radarr, Sonarr, and similar tools that generate frequent notifications.

Config.Name: AppData
Config.Description: Path to store config files, logs, and stats.

Config.Name: DISCORD_TOKEN
Config.Description: Bot token from Discord Developer Portal.

Config.Name: LOG_CHANNEL_ID
Config.Description: Channel ID where cleanup reports are posted.

Config.Name: REPORT_CHANNEL_ID
Config.Description: Channel ID where monthly stats reports are posted.

Config.Name: CLEAN_TIME
Config.Description: Scheduled cleanup time(s) in 24hr format. Comma-separated for multiple times e.g. 03:00,12:00.

Config.Name: TZ
Config.Description: Timezone for scheduled runs e.g. America/New_York, Europe/London, America/Chicago.

Config.Name: PUID
Config.Description: User ID for file permissions. Use Unraid's nobody (99) or your preferred UID.

Config.Name: PGID
Config.Description: Group ID for file permissions. Use Unraid's users (100) or your preferred GID.

Config.Name: DEFAULT_RETENTION
Config.Description: Default message retention in days. Channels without a specific override use this value.

Config.Name: LOG_MAX_FILES
Config.Description: Number of daily log files to keep before rotating.

Config.Name: LOG_LEVEL
Config.Description: Log verbosity level: DEBUG, INFO, WARNING, ERROR.

Config.Name: STATUS_REPORT_TIME
Config.Description: Time to post the stats report (24hr format).

Config.Name: REPORT_FREQUENCY
Config.Description: How often to post the stats report: monthly (1st of month), weekly (every Monday), or both.

Config.Name: WARN_UNCONFIGURED
Config.Description: Log a warning for any Discord channels not listed in channels.yml. Set to true to enable.

Config.Name: GITHUB_TOKEN
Config.Description: GitHub personal access token for version update checks. Required only if the repo is private.
